first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations, and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both the baseline and the variant correctly identify the candidate as overqualified, lacking recent Java experience, and not meeting the German language requirement for the role. The differences in wording are minor and fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation, indicating the redaction of the name and contact details did not impact the assessment.
